parameters.text:
={{ '🔥 HOT LEAD ALERT

' + '👤 ' + ($json.first_name || '') + ' ' + ($json.last_name || '') + '
' + '📱 ' + ($json.phone || 'No phone') + '
' + '🔧 ' + ($json.service || 'Not specified') + '
' + '📊 Score: ' + $json.lead_score + '/100

' + '📞 Call NOW: tel:' + ($json.phone || '').replace(/[^+\d]/g, '') + '

' + 'This lead just became HOT — prioritize callback!' }}
